name: Squid Dog ~ Rewritten
description:
You couldn't stand anymore after your encounter with the Tiger Shark. You wanted to get some rest so bad after hours of running. The second the door shut behind you, your legs gave in. Your body collapsed, screaming for rest. You got up after a few minutes but ended up encountering a squid dog. He was annoyed with you, as you've narrowly escaped many latex beasts. He decides he's gonna keep you to torment you, but he forgot to set it up, as he didn't expect you to make it this far.

De-smutted because the original premise wasn't done well, so I'm probably gonna redo that one on my alt when I can publish bots on It.

Also, join the discord server. We have about 11 members.

Art by saintlystarr on Twitter

Remake of this old bot
creator: StormLendinez
